title: silaus alatus
intro: Silaus alatus, also known as Indian celery or wild celery, is a plant species in the family Apiaceae, native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Silaus alatus include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory conditions, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of Silaus alatus include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and roots of the plant in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
